meta.title: Pathera — Share your journey
meta.description: Pathera is a social travel app that lets you share your location, memories, and journeys with the people who matter to you.

hero.subtitle: Share your location, memories, and routes with Pathera. Explore the world, save your moments, and stay connected with your travel community.
hero.ctaPrimary: Coming soon on the App Store
hero.badge: Designed for travelers. Built for memories.

mockup.search: Where do you want to go?

features.subtitle: From trip planning to sharing memories — Pathera is the hub for your journey.

items.title: Share Your Location
items.body: Share your live location on the map and see where friends are at a glance.

items.title: Share Your Moments
items.body: Share beautiful moments and inspire others with your stories.

items.title: Stay Connected
items.body: Message, comment, and stay in touch with the people who matter — wherever you are.

items.title: Privacy First
items.body: Your data and privacy are always protected. You decide what to share.

items.title: Smart Route Planning
items.body: Use our AI-powered planner to build routes based on duration, interests, and budget.

items.title: Discover & Get Inspired
items.body: Explore popular routes, find new places, and get inspired by other travelers.

explore.body: Pathera is more than a map — it's your story, memories, and discoveries.

ctaBand.title: Ready for your next journey?
ctaBand.subtitle: Plan your trips, share memories, and explore with the community on Pathera.

features.metaDescription: Pathera features — location, memories, messaging, privacy, route planning, and discovery.
features.heroSubtitle: Powerful features that make travel more planned, more social, and more memorable.

cta.title: Take your travel to the next level.
cta.subtitle: With Pathera, every journey means more.

about.metaDescription: About Pathera — AI-powered trip planning, social features, mission, and vision.
about.heroSubtitle: Pathera is a next-generation mobile app that brings AI-powered trip planning and social interaction together. It lets users create personalized travel plans, discover new places, and share those experiences with others.

values.title: Live location
values.body: Share your live location and route on the map — see who's where at a glance.

values.title: Memory feed
values.body: Share photos and stories; get inspired by the community and inspire others in return.

values.title: Messages & community
values.body: Message and comment — stay connected with the people who matter throughout your trip.

values.title: Privacy you control
values.body: You manage location, profile, and notification settings — you choose what to share and with whom.

blocks.title: Our mission
blocks.body: To make travel planning smarter, faster, and more accessible. With Pathera, users can effortlessly create trip plans with AI support while connecting with other travelers on a social platform.

blocks.title: Our vision
blocks.body: To transform the travel experience worldwide beyond planning alone into a global community focused on sharing and interaction. Our goal is for Pathera to become the standard — both as an AI-powered travel assistant and as a social discovery platform for travelers.

blocks.title: Your journey starts soon
blocks.body: Pathera is being prepared for iOS and Android. Coming soon to the App Store and Google Play — follow us on social media for updates.

cta.text: Questions? Get in touch with our team.

gallery.metaDescription: Pathera gallery — routes, memories, and destinations shared by travelers.

cta.title: Ready to share your journey?

channels.title: Social media
channels.body: Follow us on Instagram and X for updates.

faq.a: We're actively building for iOS and Android. Coming soon to the App Store and Google Play. Follow us on Instagram and X for launch updates.
Core features will be free. You'll have access to location sharing, the memory feed, and community features after launch; we'll announce premium details separately.
You decide entirely. You can turn location sharing on or off and limit visibility to your circle or selected people.
Privacy is at the heart of our design. Profile, location, and notification settings are managed in the app — you always choose what to share.
Pathera will launch in Turkish and English. This website supports both languages.

faq.q: Who should I contact for support or partnerships?
faq.a: Use support@pathera.net for general support and business@pathera.net for brand or business inquiries.
